gui.xaero_box_map_item: The ID of an item required in the hotbar for the fullscreen world map to function. Set it to "-" to have no item requirement.
gui.xaero_wm_box_cave_mode_allowed: Cave mode on the full screen world map. It's a mapping mode that can go deeper than the surface blocks, mainly to display underground caves and interiors of buildings. Cave mode is usually enabled automatically (see "Auto Cave Mode"), but can also be enabled manually on the world map screen.
gui.xaero_wm_box_cave_mode_allowed_dimen: A list of dimension IDs, separated by comas, where cave mode should work on the full screen world map. If the list is empty (just []), cave mode works in every dimension.
gui.xaero_wm_box_display_minimap_radar: Display minimap radar on the fullscreen map. Only works when the Xaero's Minimap mod is installed.
gui.xaero_wm_box_map_teleport_command: The chat commands used on this world/server to teleport you to positions on the map. Stored per world/server, not part of the config profile.
gui.xaero_wm_reset_config_profile_defaul: Are you sure you want to restore the default values in the config profile?
This action cannot be undone! Non-profile options aren't affected.
gui.xaero_world_map_config_redirect_fair: Disabled by fair-play mode enforced by the server!
